headline: Apple Reportedly Gears For Multiple Mac Launch Events;  'Silicon Transition Will Shift Into High Gear In 2022'
summary: With component shortages easing, Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is expected to announce multiple products in 2022. The spotlight, however, is likely to be on the company's Mac computers, Bloomberg Columnist Mark Gurman said in his "Power On" newsletter.

headline: Warren Buffett-Backed BYD's Export-Focused Yuan Plus Model Launched In China: What You Should Know
summary: Chinese automaker BYD Company Limited (OTC: BYDDF), which sold more EVs than Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) in China in January, is eyeing a global expansion in a big way.

headline: Cathie Wood Halves Exposure In Palantir, Dumps $148.9M Worth Shares On Friday
summary: Cathie Wood-led Ark Investment Management on Friday sold more shares of Palantir Technologies Inc (NYSE: PLTR) halving its exposure in the Peter Thiel-backed company.

headline: 10 Most Groundbreaking Animated TV Series Of All Time
summary: Seventy-five years ago, Alex Anderson and Jay Ward collaborated to form Television Arts Productions, a company with the unique goal of creating original animated series for the nascent television medium.

headline: Elon Musk's New Mystery Gal Has Been Identified And You May Have Seen Her Before
summary: After splitting with music producer Grimes, 33, in Sept 2021, Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has been spotted with a new woman.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Feb. 20-26): Reata Awaits FDA Decision, Bausch Health, Moderna Lead Earnings News Flow
summary: Biotech stock extended lower for a second straight week as risk aversion continued to pressure stocks amid geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic worries.
